offer: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients with QuickBooks, inefficient reconciliation processes cause errors and delayed financial reporting. We streamline accounts payable reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient reconciliation processes lead to errors and delayed financial reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeepers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 bookkeepers with a demo video
Join community forums for bookkeepers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for invoice data and reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
